message:
feat(v3.0): Add --optimize and --convert flags, preserve original bytes by default

BREAKING CHANGE: v3.0 no longer recompresses images by default.

- Add --optimize flag for opt-in MozJPEG compression
- Add --convert FMT flag for format conversion (jpeg, png, webp)
- Update --quality to only apply with --optimize or --convert
- Preserve original image bytes by default (no recompression)
- Update version to 3.0.0 with help text documenting behavior change
- Add getUniqueFilename ext parameter for format-aware naming

Closes hdm.5.2

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
